settings.title: Description
settings.content: Splash & Flow is a vitamin-infused shower filter that removes impurities like chlorine and hard water minerals, helping reduce hair fall, dryness, and scalp irritation from the root cause.

settings.title: Shipping & return
settings.content: Free shipping on orders above ₹1,000. 15-day return policy on unused items.

settings.title: Chlorine Test
settings.content: Removes 99.9% of chlorine. Test kit included to verify results at home.

settings.heading: Why your routine isn't working like it should
settings.quote_text: "You could spend ₹10,000 on the best serums and oils — and your water will undo it every single morning."
settings.alert_text: Splash & Flow removes the problem before it reaches your hair — so everything you already use finally works the way it should.

settings.text: Chlorine strips your scalp's moisture barrier with every shower
Hard water minerals clog follicles and cause breakage at the root
Damaged pH prevents any treatment from actually absorbing

settings.title: • Less hair fall
settings.description: Mineral buildup that weakens roots is removed — shedding visibly reduces

settings.title: • Softer, shinier hair
settings.description: Chlorine-free water lets your natural oils protect your hair properly

settings.title: • Scalp hydration
settings.description: Vitamin C & E infusion nourishes directly at the source every shower

settings.title: • Frizz reduction
settings.description: Hard water is the #1 overlooked cause of frizz no styling product can fix

settings.title: • Treatments absorb properly
settings.description: Clean water means serums, masks, and oils can finally penetrate

settings.title: • Skin clarity too
settings.description: Filtered water reduces body dryness and irritation all over

settings.title: Filtration layer
settings.description: Traps chlorine, heavy metals, and dissolved hard water minerals before water touches your hair.

settings.title: Vitamin infusion
settings.description: Enriches water with Vitamin C & E for cumulative scalp and follicle benefits every shower.

settings.title: Scalp protection
settings.description: Balances pH to reduce irritation and create the conditions healthy hair growth needs.

settings.subheading: Hear from some of our amazing customers who are building faster.
settings.heading: Listen to what our customers Say

settings.name: Meera S.
settings.text: My scalp used to itch constantly and I blamed every shampoo I tried. Turns out it was the water all along. This filter made such a difference — no more flakiness and my hair actually feels clean now.

settings.name: Divya K.
settings.text: Installing it took me less than 5 minutes and I have zero plumbing experience. My hair feels softer and looks shinier, and the tangerine scent during the shower is such a nice little bonus!

settings.name: Ananya T.
settings.text: I've been coloring my hair for years and always struggled with the color fading too fast. Since using this filter, my color lasts noticeably longer between salon visits. My hairdresser even noticed the difference!

settings.name: Priya R.
settings.text: I was skeptical at first, but after two weeks my hair stopped falling out in the shower. I didn't realize how much the hard water was damaging it until I made the switch. Honestly wish I'd found this sooner!

settings.stripe_text: one filter, long hair, zero hair problems

settings.heading: Perfect if you recognise any of these

settings.text: Hair fall in the shower or on the floor
Dry, itchy, or flakey scalp after washing
Frizzy, dry hair that resists styling
Salon color fading much too quickly
Skin feeling dry, tight, or irritated after bathing
Tried expensive hair products with no visible results
